message:
feat(fcp-e2e): scaffold end-to-end testing crate

Adds a new crate for end-to-end integration testing of the FCP
protocol stack, providing test infrastructure for multi-node scenarios.

Crate structure:
- lib.rs: Core E2E test harness and utilities
- logging.rs: Test-specific logging configuration

Dependencies:
- fcp-core, fcp-testkit for protocol primitives
- tokio for async test execution
- tracing for test observability
- chrono for timestamp handling in test reports

This crate will house integration tests that exercise the full
protocol flow across multiple simulated nodes, complementing the
unit-level conformance tests in fcp-conformance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
